task.title: Cleaning Your Product
task.shortdesc: To keep your product working at its best, you should clean it several times a

context.p: To keep your product working at its best, you should clean it several times a year.
context.note: Do not use a hard brush, alcohol, or paint thinner to clean the product or you may damage it. Do not use oil or other lubricants inside the product or let water get inside it. Do not touch the flat white cable, translucent film, or ink tubes inside the product.

step.cmd: Clean the outer case and control panel with a soft, clean cloth moistened with a little water. If you cannot remove the dirt, try cleaning with a soft cloth moistened with a mild detergent.
Clean the scanner glass with a soft, lint-free cloth (microfiber is recommended) moistened with a little glass cleaner.

info.note: Do not spray glass cleaner directly on the glass and do not press the glass surface with any force.
